rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal and bears no relation to Educ. Code §37.0071, which governs virtual education alternatives to student expulsion. No overlap in subject matter, authority, or operation.
quote: Sec. 37.0071. VIRTUAL EDUCATION AS ALTERNATIVE TO EXPULSION.
_note: No conflict; the rule and proposed change address entirely unrelated subject areas.
